title: How Long Do Solar Panels Last?
description: Most solar panels are designed to keep producing electricity for decades with gradual performance decline.
quickAnswer: Solar panels commonly last 25-30 years or more, though output gradually declines over time.

scenario.title: Lifetime Example
details: Inverter may need replacement sooner than panels

faqs.question: Do panels stop working after 25 years?
faqs.answer: Not usually. Many panels still produce power after 25 years, just at reduced output.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy homeowner solar resources
DSIRE state and utility incentive database
